# Metadata Checklist

## Required Checks

- `<title>` exists and is specific.
- `<meta name="description">` exists.
- Canonical URL exists when the page is public and canonicalization matters.
- Open Graph title, description, image, and URL exist for shareable pages.
- Twitter card metadata exists when social sharing matters.
- One clear H1.
- Heading order is not chaotic.
- Main content is text-accessible, not only image text.

## Evidence Boundary

Metadata checks require source or HTML inspection. If no source or URL is available, mark the result as `Manual` or `Skipped`.
